productDisplayName: Tantra Men's Stop Train Violet T-shirt
description: Composition:Purple round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with bold chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitTalk about the power of small actions; this purple tee from tantra will remind the world that all it takes to stop a train is a small tug on the chain. Team this tee with jeans or cargoes the next time you go out with friends, hang out at the mall or when you chill at the beach.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2.
